files.description: Repo-wide conventions and the single source of truth for AI/reviewer rules. Covers ESLint discipline, documentation discipline (session log/plan rule, packages/docs taxonomy), TODO(todo:<id>) format, temporal-agent-task block schema, secret hygiene, and fail-fast principles. CLAUDE.md is a symlink to this file.
Docs taxonomy and authoring rules: how logs, plans, todos, architecture, patterns, decisions, and guides differ; the per-session log/plan requirement; the temporal-agent-task block format.

Homelab infrastructure conventions: K8s manifests via cdk8s, OpenTofu state in SeaweedFS, ArgoCD app patterns, 1Password Connect for secrets, Talos/K8s version pins in versions.ts must mirror what is deployed, no type assertions, Bun-only APIs.
Birmel Discord bot conventions: VoltAgent setup, Prisma + libSQL memory persistence, OpenAI provider options (store: false), Bun env, Prisma client teardown in tests, no .env.test commits.

League match analysis pipeline conventions: Raw* prefix for external API types (never *Dto), Zod validation everywhere, no type assertions, no ../ imports, no workspace:* protocol (file: deps are intentional), Prisma teardown in tests, satori rendering best practices.

Temporal workflows + Home Assistant integration: workflows must be deterministic (no I/O), activities do all work, HA schema codegen, Bun.env not process.env, agent-task block schema, no direct Temporal ingress (use authenticated /agent-tasks endpoint).
Toolkit CLI conventions: gh CLI for all GitHub operations (no embedded tokens), structured logging, Bun shell ($), env-var-driven config, no secrets on disk.
React Native task app for iOS/Android: Sentry setup, Obsidian plugin API constraints, no embedded secrets in plugin bundle, build artifact handling.
Chezmoi-managed portable dotfiles. Templates over hard-coded machine state; the live file is always truth, always re-add, never apply.
